title: ononis spinosa subsp. foetens
intro: Ononis spinosa subsp. foetens, also known as the Stinking Spurrest or Smelly Restharrow, is a subspecies of the Ononis spinosa plant, a type of legume native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa subsp. foetens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from symptoms of diarrhea and other gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Ononis spinosa subsp. foetens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
